class.name: NavigationMeshAreaBox3D
class.brief_description: An axis-aligned box shape to affect the navigation mesh baking.
class.description: An axis-aligned area that draws a box shape detail onto the baked navigation mesh. [b]Note:[/b] To guarantee that the area affects the intended [NavigationMesh], make sure that 1. the area's bounds must intersect with the source geometry, and 2. the [member NavigationMeshArea3D.navigation_layers] are different from the [NavigationRegion3D] you intend to bake with. [b]Note:[/b]: Rotation is limited to the y-axis. Scaling should be done uniformly, if at all.

members.member: The size of the projected box on the xzy-axis. [b]Note:[/b] Changes require a re-baking of this area to the region.
